data.title: Saputo Inc. (TSX: SAP) elects nominees as directors at annual meeting held on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, a global press release announced that Saputo Inc. (TSX: SAP) confirmed the election of listed nominees as directors following the annual shareholder meeting. The circular dated June 5, 2025, stated the nominees who were voted to join Saputo's board at the meeting. This news signifies a key development for Saputo Inc. and its stakeholders.

data.title: First Horizon CFO Hope Dmuchowski named to Super Women in Business Class of 2025 by Memphis Business Journal.
data.description: First Horizon Corporation disclosed in Memphis, Tennessee, on August 8, 2025, that Hope Dmuchowski, the Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, has been recognized in the Memphis Business Journal's Super Women in Business Class. First Horizon Corporation, listed on NYSE under ticker symbol FHN, shared this news with the public.

data.title: U-Haul offers 30 days of free storage to those impacted by Canyon Fire near Lake Piru in SoCal. 5,000 acres currently affected by the blaze.
data.description: In Santa Clarita, California, U-Haul has opened seven facilities to offer 30 days of complimentary self-storage and U-Box portable container services to individuals affected by the Canyon Fire near Lake Piru. The fire has burned roughly 5,000 acres, leading to evacuation orders for thousands of residents in Ventura and Los Angeles Counties. Castaic is one of the communities at risk due to the blaze.

data.title: 15 days until Santa Barbara's Pacific Pride Festival on Aug 23rd, celebrating 50 years of Pride with a full day of LGBTQ+ joy.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, the highly anticipated Pacific Pride Festival is set to make a grand return to Chase Palm Park Field in just 15 days. Scheduled for Saturday, August 23rd, the event will run from 11AM to 7PM, celebrating 50 years of Pride on the Central Coast. The theme for this year is "Rooted in Pride: Embracing Our..."

data.title: Lennar introduces 2 new home collections in Anderson Farms, AZ with pricing starting at mid $200,000s.
data.description: A notable homebuilder, Lennar, has revealed the launch of two fresh home collections in Anderson Farms, a meticulously planned residential area in Maricopa, Arizona. This renowned company introduced the Dream and Vision collections, aiming to cater to all potential homeowners in the area.

data.title: Mentor avoids 39% Swiss gold tariff by purchasing one-kilogram bars, with gold position now at 80% of total valuation.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Mentor Capital, Inc. (OTCQB: MNTR) disclosed successfully avoiding President Trump's August 7, 2025, 39% tariff on two-thirds of the world’s one-kilogram and 100 ounce gold bars by previously acquiring the Company’s one-kilogram bars and gold bullion backed funds. As a result, Mentor’s gold holdings now represent around 80% of the company's total stock market value. Additionally, Mentor also possesses cash-like and energy assets.

data.title: Stock market sees Nasdaq and S&P 500 rise, with Apple, Cisco, and Alphabet contributing. SoundHound surges due to AI demand.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw significant gains with the Nasdaq and S&P 500 holding strong. This was supported by the performance of leading companies such as Apple, Cisco Systems, and Alphabet. The Dow and S&P showed notable climbs, with Apple being a standout in the tech sector. SoundHound also experienced a surge in its stock price due to increased demand for artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Cohen & Co acquires Gioffre & Company, LLP, a Westchester County-based accounting firm with 50 years of experience.
data.description: In a recent development on August 8, 2025, Gioffre & Company, LLP (Gioffre) announced its merger with Cohen & Co, a leading tax and accounting firm in the United States. Gioffre, located in Westchester County, New York, is a comprehensive accounting firm boasting a cumulative experience of more than 50 years. The move signifies a significant milestone for both companies as they come together to enhance their services and expertise in the financial sector.

data.title: New luxury homes in Bellevue, Washington's Enclave at Kelsey Creek community offer access to schools and job centers.
data.description: The Enclave at Kelsey Creek neighborhood in Bellevue presents a collection of upscale residences, providing residents with proximity to esteemed schools and local job hubs. This community boasts new luxury homes equipped with modern amenities and style. Enjoy living in a prime location with access to top-rated schools, ensuring quality education for families. Additionally, residents benefit from convenience with nearby employment centers, offering opportunities for work and career growth. Experience luxurious living in Bellevue's Enclave at Kelsey Creek neighborhood, with homes that cater to comfort and style for families seeking an elevated lifestyle.
